message:
test(wave-60): trait coverage for compress, cache, transport, forensic_log

ContentEncoding Hash/Clone/Copy/Eq, IdentityCompressor/Decompressor
Debug/Default, CachePadded Debug/Clone/Copy, PacketNumberSpace/
SentPacketMeta/AckRange/AckEvent/RttEstimator trait impls,
QuicH3Event/InvariantVerdict/EventTimeline/TransportSummary/H3Summary/
LifecycleTransition/FailureFingerprint Debug/Clone coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
